Malmö University.degree:
Bachelor of Science (BS) 
 Leadership and Organization
Malmö University.description: Courses in projectual knowledge and strategical, sustainable and organizational leadership. My bachelor thesis covers the research development of transformational leadership during the years 1990-2013. Swedish version can be downloaded here: http://muep.mah.se/handle/2043/16928

 Project Management within Publishing
Malmö University.description: Courses in projectual knowledge and publishing skills. Some courses in law and web design were included as well.

John Bauergymnasiet.degree:
Upper secondary school exam 
 Information Technology
John Bauergymnasiet.description: Member of the student board. Also a member of the prom committee. DJ and founder of the school radio (which started as a school project).

Viva Media.title: Backend Developer
Viva Media.description: As a backend developer in a cross-functional team of nine people, I have launched over ten custom websites and e-commerce platforms, where I have been responsible for implementing custom themes and features in PHP, WordPress and WooCommerce for clients such as Kalmar Slott, Bergkvara Buss and The National Golf & Resort.

ID Kommunikation.title: Full-stack Developer
ID Kommunikation.description: As a full-stack developer in a two-person team, I have launched over 20 custom websites and e-commerce solutions, where I have developed custom features and themes in PHP, WordPress and WooCommerce for clients such as Skånemejerier, Nordic Sugar and Skanska.

KAN.title: Front-end Developer
KAN.description:
I led front-end projects with a focus on user-friendly and accessible solutions in PHP, HTML, CSS and JavaScript, where I transformed design ideas into visually appealing websites. By collaborating with developers and designers, I delivered quality projects on time, while constantly staying up-to-date on new technologies and improving my skills. 
 Working with brands such as: Subaru, Midroc, Isuzu, ZetaDisplay, Region Skåne, etc.

Nocnoc.title: Front-end Developer / Graphic Designer
Nocnoc.description:
Responsible for creating websites, web apps and print-ready material. 
 Working with brands such as: The Mauler, Ninjas in Pyjamas, FC Rosengård, The Swedish Football Association, Sigma Group, Mikz, Zlatan Unplugged, Messi 10, Mikkey Dee, The Swedish Athletic Association, Fingerprint Cards, Bona and Gothia Cup China
